final_text: {"decision":"Adopt q4_0/q4_0 configuration to resolve the 2.5s latency bottleneck on CPU-only ORION-7 by reducing memory footprint and enabling larger context windows for long logs while maintaining safety-critical confidence thresholds.","evidence":"TurboQuant KV is faster than q4_0/q4_0 in all 8K comparisons; q4_0/q4_0 offers the best balance of reduced memory footprint and maintained reasoning accuracy on CPU-only hardware, directly addressing the latency bottleneck without sacrificing safety.","caveats":"Claims must use 'quality-preserving' or 'near-lossless' rather than 'strict lossless' as q8_0/tbq4 is the conservative candidate for preserving prompt quality, and tbq4 offers no performance benefit over q4_0 on this architecture.","next_action":"Deploy q4_0/q4_0 configuration to ORION-7 and monitor the reasoning loop step duration to confirm sub-2.5s performance in high-context scenarios."}
